title: Turkish Airlines Miles&Smiles Status Challenge - 4-year Star Alliance Gold path
notes: 4 months trial -> fly TK 1x int'l -> 15K status miles year 1 -> Gold for 2 yrs -> 22.5K miles year 2 -> renew 2 more yrs. Eligibility requires existing Star Gold/OW Sapphire/SkyTeam E+.
